756 A0310G1_INTRPTED_STAY_CD A0310G1_INTRPTED_STAY_CD A0310G1 Interrupted Stay Code CHAR 1 Indicates whether or not an interrupted stay occurred. 0 = No

757 GG0130A5_SELF_CARE_EATG_CD GG0130A5_SELF_CARE_EATG_CD GG0130A5 Self Care: Eating Ability (Interim Perf) CHAR 2 Eating: The ability to use suitable utensils to bring food and/or liquid to the mouth and swallow food and/or liquid
